   - For example, offer 10 Y for 10 X: This doubles my X (5 → 15) and reduces my Y by 40% (25 → 15), but I gain 10 X (double my current X). The net gain in total resources is still positive (30 → 25 Y + 15 X = 40 total, up from 30). This is better than accepting the original offer (which would leave me with 20 Y + 15 X = 35 total).

   - I prefer the second option (7 Y for 10 X) because it balances the trade more favorably for me while still maximizing my X gain.
</reason>
